continueEditingHint: The document stays open; you can keep editing.
saveErrorUnexpected: An unexpected error occurred while saving the document.
confirmClear: The editor content will be cleared. Continue?

tooltips.shareEnabled: Share via QR code, link, or WhatsApp

shareModal.title: Share document
shareModal.linkOn: Anyone with the link can view
shareModal.qrCaption: Scan the QR code to open the document

signatureModal.title: Sign document
signatureModal.canvasHint: Draw your signature in the area below
signatureModal.legal: By signing, you confirm that you have read and approve this document. Your signature will be stored digitally and the document integrity can be verified with a hash.
signatureModal.errorAlert: An error occurred while saving the signature.

ai.title: AI assistant

fullDoc.label: Create full document
fullDoc.prompt: Create this document professionally. Include all sections, tables, and legal references. Place company information in the content; do not leave empty placeholders.

intro.label: Write introduction
intro.prompt: Write a professional introduction and purpose section for this document. Use the company name and sector.

legal.label: Add legal basis
legal.prompt: Prepare a legal basis section according to Law 6331 on occupational health and safety and related regulations (adapt references to the applicable jurisdiction where relevant).

regs.label: Legislative references
regs.prompt: List all applicable legislative references for this document type.

ai.customRequestPlaceholder: What would you like me to generate?
ai.improveHint: Select text in the editor, then click this button.
ai.generatingMobileNote: If the connection is slow on mobile, the system prepares a local draft so you are not left waiting.
ai.emptyState: Click one of the buttons above to start generating content with AI.
ai.degradedNotice: The AI service ran in a protected mode. A local draft was produced; you can edit and save it.
ai.degradedQueueHint: The request may still be processing in the background; try again shortly.
ai.insertedSuccess: Content was added to the editor successfully
ai.improveChooseType: What kind of improvement should be applied?

errors.quotaDefault: Your document AI package limit has been reached. Upgrade your plan to continue.
errors.serviceUnavailable: Error: the AI service is not responding. Please try again.
errors.emptyResponseWithFallback: The AI returned an empty response. A local draft was prepared so the action does not stall on mobile.
errors.abortWithFallback: The AI request timed out. A local draft was prepared so you are not left waiting on mobile.
errors.connectionWithFallback: A connection error occurred. A local draft was prepared so the result is not empty on mobile.
errors.emptyResponseImprove: The AI returned an empty response. Try selecting a shorter piece of text.
errors.abortImprove: The AI request timed out. Try selecting a shorter piece of text.
errors.serviceUnavailableImprove: Error: the AI service is not responding.
errors.quotaShort: Your document AI package limit has been reached.

professionalize.label: Make more professional
professionalize.prompt: Rewrite this text in professional occupational health and safety language. Use a formal, corporate tone.

shorten.label: Shorten
shorten.prompt: Shorten and simplify this text without losing the core meaning.

detail.label: Add detail
detail.prompt: Expand this text to be more detailed and comprehensive. Fill in missing information where appropriate.

legal.label: Add legal references
legal.prompt: Add relevant articles from Law 6331 and regulation references to this text (adapt to the applicable jurisdiction where relevant).

fallback.paragraphScope: This document was prepared for {company} for use in OHS, operations, and record-keeping processes.
fallback.bullet1: Define responsible persons and approval flow
fallback.bullet3: Act in line with legal basis and company procedures
fallback.bullet4: Report nonconformities and critical risks without delay
fallback.legal1: Law 6331 on occupational health and safety (and applicable national equivalents)
fallback.legal2: Related regulations and internal company procedures
